name: Cadillac Area YMCA Dillon Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Cadillac Area YMCA Dillon Community Center in Cadillac, MI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. Reservations are not available. A membership is required to play.

name: Cadillac Senior Center
description: Cadillac Senior Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cadillac, MI. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility is wheelchair accessible. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: See picture of sign with schedule details.
hours: Monday, Wednesday,Thursday: 9:30-3:30 ​ Tuesdays are trip days and the center and office are closed. Check out our newsletter for trips Activities offered Monday-Friday: 8:00-3:30 plus some scheduled weekend activities. ​ PLEASE NOTE: When the Cadillac Area Public Schools are closed DUE TO WEATHER we are CLOSED and all scheduled trips cancelled. ©2014 by cadillacseniorcenter.wix.com/cadillac. name: Evergreen Golf Resort
description: Evergreen Golf Resort is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cadillac, MI. There are 4 outdoor clay and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like food, a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.
